title: Enterprise Profile for the Precision Time Protocol with Mixed Multicast and Unicast Messages
source: Timing over IP Connection and Transfer of Clock
abstract: This document describes a Precision Time Protocol (PTP) Profile (IEEE Standard 1588-2019) for use in an IPv4 or IPv6 enterprise information system environment.  The PTP Profile uses the End-to-End delay measurement mechanism, allowing both multicast and unicast Delay Request and Delay Response messages.
